name: Bavarian Beef Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened cream cheese, sour cream, and horseradish in a bowl.
2. Mix until well blended.
3. For each sandwich, spread the cream cheese mixture onto one side of a bread slice or sub bun.
4. Add roast beef slices, lettuce, and red onion slices on top of the cream cheese.
5. Place the other slice of bread or sub bun on top to complete the sandwich.
6. If desired, add additional cream cheese spread for extra flavor.
